title: Isolation of murine hepatocytes to measure protein synthesis ex vivo upon stimulation
author: sprotocols
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: This procedure describes a method for isolation of murine hepatocytes using a modified two-step perfusion method. This protocol allows to measure the level of protein synthesis in primary hepatocytes after stimulation with growth factor and hormones.
steps_raw: This procedure describes a method for isolation of murine hepatocytes using a modified two-step perfusion method. This protocol allows to measure the level of protein synthesis in primary hepatocytes after stimulation with growth factor and hormones.
